focus: Keyword map display fix, EzIcon dark mode, settings/insights container width consistency
notes: S0086: Fixed keyword map not displaying Google Ads keywords (bestPosition=999 filter removed). Fixed EzIcon dark mode (resolves currentColor via getComputedStyle). Fixed settings page container width (mx-auto in flex-col causes shrink-to-content, added w-full). Fixed insights page container class consistency. Restructured settings layout with CSS Grid sidebar inside card.
